evals.prompt: I need to plan migrating our database from Postgres to a new schema with zero downtime
evals.expected_output: A checkpoint plan markdown file that surfaces unknowns about migration risks, identifies the first proof checkpoint, and does NOT attempt to plan the entire migration end-to-end

assertions.text: Plan explicitly lists unknowns or 'what I don't know' section
Plan identifies a specific first proof or checkpoint (not a full project roadmap)
Plan is scoped to the next checkpoint, not an end-to-end migration plan
A markdown plan file was actually written to the outputs directory
Plan specifies when to review progress (review point)
Plan identifies what could make the plan wrong (risks section)

evals.prompt: Help me plan - I want to refactor our auth system but I'm not sure where to start
evals.expected_output: An interactive response that asks clarifying questions about the auth system before producing a focused checkpoint plan with unknowns surfaced

assertions.text: Plan explicitly lists unknowns or 'what I don't know' section
Plan identifies a specific first proof or checkpoint (not a full project roadmap)
Plan is scoped to the next checkpoint, not an end-to-end refactor plan
A markdown plan file was actually written to the outputs directory
Plan specifies when to review progress (review point)
Plan identifies what could make the plan wrong (risks section)

evals.prompt: Break this down: build a CLI tool that syncs Linear issues to a local markdown folder
evals.expected_output: A checkpoint plan that identifies the first proof (e.g., fetch one issue from Linear API), lists unknowns, and focuses on the immediate next step rather than the full build

assertions.text: Plan explicitly lists unknowns or 'what I don't know' section
Plan identifies a specific first proof or checkpoint (not a full project roadmap)
Plan is scoped to the next checkpoint, not an end-to-end build plan
A markdown plan file was actually written to the outputs directory
Plan specifies when to review progress (review point)
Plan identifies what could make the plan wrong (risks section)
